description_long: This is a sealed, pillow-shaped snack bag with a vibrant red exterior, featuring bold white and green text and high-resolution images of round, crispy chips. The front of the bag displays a large depiction of the chips alongside a red pepper, suggesting a spicy or paprika flavor. The packaging is glossy and slightly crinkled, typical of flexible plastic snack bags, and the branding is prominently displayed in large, stylized letters. The sides of the bag show additional images of the chips and peppers, with some smaller text indicating the flavor. The bag appears to be filled with air to protect the chips inside, giving it a puffed appearance. No visible nutritional labeling or promotional graphics are present on the exterior.
description: A glossy red snack bag with bold branding and images of round chips and a red pepper, indicating a paprika-flavored snack. The packaging is pillow-shaped and slightly puffed with air.
description_view_0: The bottom view shows the sealed seam and the lower part of the branding text on the red bag.
description_view_1: The side view highlights the bag's puffed shape and displays images of chips and part of the flavor text.
description_view_2: The top view features the main branding, a large image of a chip, and a red pepper, clearly indicating the flavor.
description_view_3: The opposite side view shows more chips and the pepper graphic, with the bag's glossy red surface visible.
attribute_brand_logo: A large, stylized white and green logo is visible on the front and sides of the bag, occupying a central position on the red background.
attribute_flavor_indication: The front of the bag shows a red pepper and the text 'RED PAPRIKA', indicating a paprika flavor.
